claim: Paige Ostroushko was arrested for assaulting reporter Savanah Hernandez during an anit-ICE protest, with videos showing the incident and charges to be filed.

sub_questions.question: Was Paige Ostroushko arrested? If so, when and where?
Did Paige Ostroushko assault Savanah Hernandez? If so, what was the nature of the assault?
Did this incident occur during an anti-ICE protest?
Are there videos showing the incident?
Were charges filed against Paige Ostroushko? If so, what charges?
